narrative:
Granville Village B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,264 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.9 percentage points.
